mapper.select: SELECT id, email, password, provider, provider_id as providerId, nickname, profile_image as profileImage, birthday, gender, phone, status, postcode, address, detail_address as detailAddress, Lat as lat, Lng as lng, created_at as createdAt FROM User WHERE email = #{email}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO User ( email, password, provider, provider_id, nickname, profile_image, birthday, gender, phone, status, postcode, address, detail_address, Lat, Lng, created_at ) VALUES ( #{email}, #{password}, #{provider}, #{providerId}, #{nickname}, #{profileImage}, #{birthday}, #{gender}, #{phone}, 'active', #{postcode}, #{address}, #{detailAddress}, #{lat}, #{lng}, NOW() )
INSERT INTO user_terms (user_id, terms_id, agreed, agreed_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{termsId}, #{agreed}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT type, version, content, is_required AS isRequired FROM terms
